title: Chapter 53
content:
Chapter 53: Chapter 53: Meanwhile

Somewhere inside the Azure Dragons Sect core disciple area, a man sitting on the luxurious sofa, with his leg crossed, and a man kneeling in front of him.

"Young Master Kai, we just got a report that Damon back to the sect." the kneeling man said.

"What?" Young Master Kai said in calm voice but his brow rising.

"Yes, Damon just—" before the kneeling man finish his word he was blown across the room.

"Useless bunch! They can even take care a pretty face commoner, who only at eighth stage of elementary realm." He was still sitting in the sofa, but he releases his cultivation aura filled with rage.

"Young Master, please calm down. It’s just coincidence, the must miss each other." the blasted man said.

"Then, you take care of this. I’m going to seclusion; I’m close reaching heavenly spirit realm. Once I’m out, all I want to hear that he is dead you go it?!" Young Master Kai said as he stood up.

"Yes, young master!" the blasted man run to do his mission.

Once Young Master Kai alone, he started to mumble.

"You are just a newcomer! I can forgive you when you kill Jack, since take revenge for his death just a bonus point for me in front of Frostborn family and Selene. But you dare to flirt with my target? My twin beauty! My Future concubine! Then feel the wrath of Reventon family heir!" As Young Master Kai walk toward his cultivation room.

****

Meanwhile, On the mountain range on the top of Azure Dragon Sect near the sect master residence, there a mansion where VIP guest resides. Inside it there two identical beauties sleeping on a bed.

Mio and Mia slowly open their eyes and notice the celling.

’They supposed to be at Fire Valley, and where is Damon?’

"Where am I?" Mio said while scanning the surrounding while Mia just silent but do the same.

Suddenly the door to their room open followed with seductive soft voice.

"Oh~ My baby already woke up."

Hearing the voice, both of them look at the source and found familiar figure.

"Mom!" Mio said and jumped to hugged her.

Meanwhile, Mia shyly approaches Mei and hugged her silently.

"Ho~ Ho~, my babies are miss me." Mei said and looked at them with loving eyes.

"What are you doing here, mom? and when did you come?" Mio asked Mei.

"Well, I’m just here to check, how you two doing... and—" Mei about to answer but Mia cut her.

"Where Damon? Is he okay?" Mia asks with worried voice.

"Yes, that’s right! Where Is he?" Mio added.

"Ohh~ It seem my daughters change, now they more worried about her man than missing her mother~" Mei tease Mia.

Hearing this they blush in embarrassment.

"H-How did you know?" Mio asks.

"Ohh~ Come on baby you are too young to hide it for me~ Both of your Yin Essence gone, you think I didn’t notice? and you stick to him closely when together with him." Mei tells her.

"Wha—? You followed us?" Mia shock, she didn’t realize at all.

"Well~ not exactly, I was following your man and coincidently you two together with him and the reason is—" This time Mio cut her.

"Forget about that. Is he okay? Where is he now?" Mio ask in urgent.

"Ahhh... You both really change... He is okay, he should be already back to the sect, he should be in his vil—" Without letting their mother finish, Mio and Mia dash out the room and went to see Damon.

Seeing her both daughters dash out, and amused face appear on Mei face.

"Ho~ Ho~, not only you capture their hearts, but you also change them. To think that shy and silent Mia would be this proactive, and that carefree and airhead Mio to be so worried." as she looks at her daughter vanishing silhouette.

"Looks like I need to see what kind of man you are... to make my daughters like this... To think you stole my daughters like this... "

"Sorry, girls looks like I need to play him later... Ho~ Ho~ Ho~" Mei let out a seductive laugh and a sadistic smile appear on her lips.

"This is going to be fun..." Mei said like she finds a new toy to play with.

****

On his villa, Damon laying on his bed naked with his eyes closed relaxing. Next to him Ariel laying on her belly didn’t move, she completely spent and passed out, being ravage by Damon.

Her body covered with Damon sperm and viscous white liquid leaking from her pussy and butthole.

Suddenly his snapped open and rise up to seated position as he feels a chills on his back.

’What the hell was that? Why I suddenly felt chills on my back?’

But the system didn’t let him think about it a flurry of notification appears in front of him.

[Ariel’s Interest reaches 1000/1000, new relationship level unlocked, +4000 lust points!]

[Ariel’s Relationship change from In Love to Deeply In Love, +10000 lust points!]

[Now point gains from Ariel will be multiplied by 5]

[You fucked a woman that deeply love you, +1000 lust points]

[You had intense sex with a woman that love you deeply, +1500 lust points]

[You made a woman that love you deeply climax multiple times, +5000 lust points]

[You cum inside a woman that love you deeply multiple times, +5000 lust points]

[Ariel’s Interest has increased tremendously! +3000 lust points]

[You cum inside a woman’s womb that love you deeply multiple times, +5000 lust points]

[You cum inside a woman’s ass that love you deeply multiple times, +5000 lust points]

[...]

...

...

Looking at the new notification, he then looks at Ariel’s new status.

[Name: Ariel Aquaria]

[Age: 17]

[Cultivation: Elementary Spirit Realm - Ninth Level]

[Relationship: Deeply in Love]

[Interest: 300/5000]
